title: Build Homes for Wildlife – Protect Nature Challenge - Canada.ca
content:
## Build Homes for Wildlife – Protect Nature Challenge
Making space for nature starts at home.
Learn how to properly build a bird, bat or bee house. By creating homes for these creatures, you are helping them to survive and thrive, particularly in urban environments, where it might be harder for them to find a good home.
Learn to build a nest box for birds, a bat house and a mason bee hive .

## Let’s do this together
Share these challenges with your friends and family and show us what you are doing by tagging us in your social media messages and by using the hashtag #ProtectNature.
We’re on Instagram @canenvironment , Facebook @EnvironmentandClimateChange and Twitter @environmentca .
Check out our list of challenges to help protect nature.

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
